rulings.Case Title: MARCOS ANDRADE GALVAN VS. ONEWEST BANK, FSB, et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 28, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT ONEWEST BANK's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend; amendments shall be made in capital letters. Plaintiff failed to comply with with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6b and court's order of mar-14-2012 requiring compliance. = (501/REQ)
